summary: Across the year, the engineer focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform, developing firmware for HID devices, and conducting AI research for trading and poker. Additional work spanned Android LLM assistants, Windows utilities, and automation tooling.

items.title: Windows input filter driver development
items.description: Built a KMDF input filter driver for capturing and injecting keyboard/mouse events, adding integration tests and library features.

items.title: Crypto trading platform iteration
items.description: Iterated on the SaaS crypto trading platform, adding infrastructure, security hardening, and user-facing features like templates and topology visualization.

items.title: Firmware iteration for ESP32-S3 HID device
items.description: Continued development of the mouse/keyboard emulation firmware, adding new hardware variants and stability fixes.

items.title: File tagging utility maintenance
items.description: Polished the Windows Explorer file-tagging tool, fixing metadata handling and release workflow.

items.title: Aim assist and overlay tool development
items.description: Worked on a personal C++ project for aim assist with YOLO detection, overlay, and input emulation.

items.title: Firmware version upgrades
items.description: Added dual-core and USB support for new firmware versions of the HID emulation device.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model research
items.description: Conducted research on deep learning models for crypto price prediction, experimenting with Mixture of Experts architectures and benchmarking.

items.title: Android LLM assistant with phone control
items.description: Developed an Android app for on-device LLM with tool use, implementing sub-agent delegation and model management.

items.title: E-reader custom firmware development
items.description: Built custom firmware for an e-reader device, adding a map viewer, knowledge base, and book processing pipeline.

items.title: File tagging utility release engineering
items.description: Set up CI/CD pipelines, Microsoft Store publishing, and CLI features for the file-tagging tool.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Developed a code intelligence tool that indexes codebases into a knowledge graph, adding LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: Telegram node for n8n automation
items.description: Maintained a fork of the TelePilot n8n node, fixing authentication issues and adding new triggers.

items.title: Firmware stability fixes
items.description: Addressed connectivity and restart issues in the HID firmware.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games, including hand detection and state recovery.

items.title: Aim assist tool updates
items.description: Continued work on the aim assist project, adding new modes and HID click emulation.

items.title: Task management Android app
items.description: Built a simple task management app for Android with touch event visualization.

items.title: Firmware v11 feature expansion
items.description: Developed v11 firmware with new device support, BLE safety features, and performance profiles.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Worked on an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant, adding squash merge and worktree management features.

items.title: Aim assist input emulation
items.description: Added USB HID mouse movement and rate limiting to the aim assist tool.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Created and refined trading strategies for Freqtrade, adding new strategy variants and performance optimizations.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram bot monitoring
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for monitoring Freqtrade instances, with profit tracking and web dashboard.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot
items.description: Developed a Telegram bot for content forwarding and summarization, with multi-target sending.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot, focusing on hyperparameter tuning and performance.

items.title: Crypto signal bot development
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for crypto trading signals, integrating AI analysis and technical indicators.

items.title: File tagging utility early development
items.description: Started the Windows Explorer file-tagging project, adding CLI and UI features.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET Telegram bot for ChatGPT, handling long messages and updates.
